narrative:
Strongsville-01-E (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,137 registered voters, with 52.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.0%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.8 percentage points.
